_mechanism: GSTM1 and GSTT1 exhibit copy number deletion polymorphisms. 'Null' genotype (homozygous deletion) results in absent enzyme activity. Detected by absence of PCR product or homozygous DEL in VCF/array data.
_gstm1_equity: GSTM1 null frequency: AFR ~25%, EUR ~50%, EAS ~55%, SAS ~35%.
_gstt1_equity: GSTT1 null frequency: AFR ~20%, EUR ~15%, EAS ~55%, SAS ~25%.
